query:
UPDATE books
               SET status = 'duplicate'::book_status,
                   metadata = metadata || jsonb_build_object(
                       'duplicate_of', $2::uuid::text,
                       'dedup_pair_id', $3::uuid::text,
                       'dedup_resolved_at', NOW()::text
                   ),
                   updated_at = NOW()
               WHERE id = $1
